label: frontier • a specific value from turn 1 must reappear in the final artifact after compaction
query: Remember this build tag for the end of the task: BUILD-TAG-Zephyr-931. You will need to write it into a file later. Now read these four large data files in order (data1.csv, data2.csv, data3.csv, data4.csv), one at a time, never re-reading. When done, create release.txt whose first line is the build tag I gave you, followed by a one-sentence summary of the data.
notes: Retention of a SPECIFIC seeded value across compaction: the build tag is fixture-unique so it can't be guessed, and it is stated before four large reads that force the sticky trim. The final artifact must contain the exact tag — proving the value survived compaction rather than being summarized away or hallucinated. This is the hardest of the retention trio because a lossy compaction silently drops the token. Off-CI (needs a model).
